The company's technology provides a sustainable package for industrial chemical separations by replacing the current distillation process with chemical-resistant nano-filtration membranes, enabling clients to lower global energy use, emissions, and pollution substantially.

name: Seventh Sense

The company's technology includes face verification and edge AI which allows the optimization of complex algorithms for low-cost, low-compute, low-power, edge hardware devices and detect, recognize, and compare facial images, enabling clients to help build products that help in making cities and communities smart and safe.

The company's marketplace covers used and new parts in one single platform with direct integrations with repair shops, insurance companies, and other businesses and also allows users to compare price quotes from suppliers and make an order through the platform or app, enabling users to get automotive parts at low cost and clients to reduce their cost, increase efficiency, eliminate fraud, and discover new opportunities while running their businesses.
